comment.body:
So once again:
I noted that structurally the market is underpressure (until upside pivot area, written in the free post)
Weekly post warned for risk after Wednesday, also I repeated this multiple times during the week that "something just feels off into Thu" remember?
Now it is thursday, and the market was not clean: the pivotal area was sold, while downside remained hedged... this leans towards downside risk, but only slightly.
The positioning was uncertain. We got both moves: up to 6770, then down to 6553
